title: melica pappiana
intro: Melica pappiana, also known as Pappian's melick, is a perennial grass-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melica pappiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melica pappiana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems.
